<includeonly><table class="infobox">
<caption>{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</caption>
{{#if:{{{image|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-image">[[File:{{{image}}}|frameless|220px]]{{#if:{{{caption|}}}|<div style="font-size:90%">{{{caption}}}</div>}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{other_names|}}}|<tr><th>Other names</th><td>{{{other_names}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{birth_date|}}}|<tr><th>Born</th><td>{{{birth_date}}}{{#if:{{{birth_place|}}}|<br />{{{birth_place}}}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{death_date|}}}|<tr><th>Died</th><td>{{{death_date}}}{{#if:{{{death_place|}}}|<br />{{{death_place}}}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{nationality|}}}|<tr><th>Nationality</th><td>{{{nationality}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{home_town|}}}|<tr><th>Home town</th><td>{{{home_town}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{education|}}}|<tr><th>Education</th><td>{{{education}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{alma_mater|}}}|<tr><th>Alma mater</th><td>{{{alma_mater}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{occupation|}}}|<tr><th>Occupation</th><td>{{{occupation}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{known_for|}}}|<tr><th>Known for</th><td>{{{known_for}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{relatives|}}}|<tr><th>Relatives</th><td>{{{relatives}}}</td></tr>}}
</table></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Infobox person
| name        = John Smith
| image       = Photo.jpg
| caption     = At the park, 2020
| birth_date  = 1990
| birth_place = Pune
| home_town   = Bangalore
| education   = BSc Computer Science
| occupation  = Engineer
| known_for   = Something notable
}}
</pre>

Uses the same parameter names as [[wikipedia:Template:Infobox person|Wikipedia's Infobox person]]. This is a lightweight fallback — import the full Wikipedia template for complete functionality.

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
